reasoning: Initial observation suggests a linear relationship between absorbance and the product of molar absorptivity, concentration, and path length. To confirm this, I will increase the molar absorptivity and observe the change in absorbance.
The absorbance has doubled when the molar absorptivity was doubled, suggesting a linear relationship. Next, I will increase the concentration to further test the hypothesis.

The absorbance has increased proportionally with both the molar absorptivity and concentration, supporting the Beer-Lambert law. No need to change path length as it remains constant and absorbance is already at a high value. Finalizing the equation based on observed relationships.
